# TalentNest HR — llms.txt

## About
TalentNest HR is India's IT staffing agency and multi-tenant B2B SaaS recruitment platform, founded and headquartered in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. We connect the top 1% of IT, Cybersecurity, and Executive talent with companies across India. Our platform delivers pre-screened candidate shortlists within 48 hours and includes a 90-day replacement guarantee for all placed candidates.

## Core Products
- **Job Board**: Public job listings aggregated from employer postings across the platform. Searchable by role, location, and domain. 2000+ active jobs.
- **HireBoard (ATS Pipeline)**: Applicant Tracking System for recruiters and hiring managers to manage candidates from application through offer. Includes video interviews, offer letters, and pre-boarding.
- **PeopleDesk (HRMS)**: HR Management System for post-hire onboarding, background verification, employee records, and team management.
- **JobTrack**: Candidate-facing portal for browsing jobs, tracking application status, receiving job alerts, attending video interviews, and signing offer letters.

## Staffing Services
- IT Staffing (software engineers, full-stack developers, cloud architects, DevOps, data scientists)
- Cybersecurity Staffing (security analysts, penetration testers, GRC specialists, CISOs)
- Non-IT Staffing (operations, finance, HR, sales leadership)
- Permanent Staffing (direct placement with 90-day replacement guarantee)
- Contract to Hire (flexible trial before permanent offer)
- Corp to Corp (C2C) (B2B contractor placements)
- Executive Search (C-suite and senior leadership placement)

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2024, Hyderabad, India
- Coverage: Pan-India (Hyderabad, Bangalore, Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Chennai, Pune, Tirupati, Vijayawada, Noida, Gurgaon, Kolkata, Ahmedabad)
- Pricing: Starting ₹5,000/year for SaaS platform access
- SLA: 48-hour shortlist delivery for all roles
- Guarantee: 90-day candidate replacement at no extra cost
- Jobs: 2,000+ active job listings across 53 industry categories
- Compliance: Confidential hiring process, DMARC-compliant email, secure data handling

- https://www.talentnesthr.com/sitemap.xml (sitemap index)
- https://www.talentnesthr.com/sitemap-jobs.xml (all 2000+ job URLs, dynamic from MongoDB)
- https://www.talentnesthr.com/sitemap-pages.xml (marketing pages)

## Contact
Address: TalentNest HR, Ganesh Nagar, Ameenpur, Hyderabad, Telangana 500049, India
Phone: +91 79955 35539
Email: contact form available at https://www.talentnesthr.com/contact
Social: LinkedIn (linkedin.com/company/talentnesthr), Instagram (@talentnesthr),
        Facebook (facebook.com/talentnesthr), X/Twitter (@talentnesthr),
        YouTube (youtube.com/@talentnesthr)

## Technical
- Frontend: React 18 + Vite, deployed on Vercel
- Backend: Node.js + Express + MongoDB Atlas, deployed on Render
- Job schema: Google for Jobs-compliant JobPosting JSON-LD on every job page
- All jobs crawlable by: Googlebot, NaukriBot, IndeedBot, LinkedInBot, GlassdoorBot
